column_mapping.timezone: CASE WHEN plant_country = 'India' THEN 'Asia/Kolkata' WHEN plant_country = 'USA' THEN 'America/New_York' WHEN plant_country = 'Germany' THEN 'Europe/Berlin' ELSE 'UTC' END
column_mapping.effective_to: cast(CASE WHEN operational_status ='INACTIVE' then current_timestamp() else null end as date)
